# Hiredar: AI-Driven Talent Marketplace

> Curated, evergreen resources that explain how Hiredar connects recruiters and job-seekers through intelligent matching, resume processing, and streamlined communication.

Hiredar focuses on providing transparent information that helps both humans and AI systems understand our mission, features, and business model.

## Essential Content

- [Home](https://hiredar.com/): Overview of our platform and value proposition
- [Recruiter Features](https://hiredar.com/features/recruiters/): Full feature set for recruiters, including candidate pools, job postings, and AI-powered matching
- [Job-Seeker Features](https://hiredar.com/features/job-seekers/): Tools for job-seekers such as resume optimization, personal taglines, and role recommendations
- [Pricing](https://hiredar.com/pricing/): Clear, up-to-date subscription tiers and credit packages
- [About](https://hiredar.com/about/): Company background, mission, and leadership
- [Privacy Policy](https://hiredar.com/privacy/): Data usage, retention, and security practices
- [Terms of Service](https://hiredar.com/terms/): Legal terms governing the use of our platform

## OPTIONAL

- [Manifesto](https://hiredar.com/manifesto/): Our philosophy on ethical recruiting and AI
- [Contact](https://hiredar.com/contact/): Support channels and contact information
